title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.370 - Endorsement of duplicate bonds
text:
33.370.  Endorsement of duplicate bonds. — Said duplicate bonds or coupons shall be endorsed when registered and before delivery, as follows:
(RSMo 1939 § 13074, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 91) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11457; 1919 § 13363; 1909 § 11864
